fixed_q.q: Thierry Henry was France's all-time leading scorer before Olivier Giroud surpassed him. Henry played for which English club?
Which Yankees first baseman played 2,130 consecutive games to set a then-record?
Who is the WNBA all-time leading scorer?
Which team scored 70 points in a single regular season NFL game in 2023?
fixed_q.a: Miami Dolphins beat the Denver Broncos 70-20 in 2023
choices: Miami Dolphins beat the Denver Broncos 70-20 in 2023

fixed_q.q: Which kicker made an NFL-record 44 consecutive field goals from 2015 to 2016?
This forward played in a record 8 consecutive NBA Finals from 2011 to 2018, winning three of them. Name him.
I led the league in scoring 10 times, more than any other player in NBA history, and hold the record for the highest career scoring average at 30.12 points per game. Who am I?
This running back rushed for 2,097 yards in 2012, coming within 8 yards of the single-season record. Name him.
I had 297 consecutive regular-season starts at quarterback, an NFL ironman record that stood for decades. Who am I?
This quarterback threw for 5,477 yards in 2013 with the Denver Broncos, setting the NFL single-season record. Name him.
I held the all-time NFL record for most career passing touchdowns with 649 at my retirement. Who am I?
I rushed for 1,000 yards in 11 consecutive seasons, an NFL record. Who am I?
This quarterback was named to 8 Pro Bowls during his career and spent most of his career with the San Diego Chargers. Name him.
This pitcher won 19 consecutive decisions in the 1912 season, a record that stood for decades. He finished with 201 career wins. Name him.
I set a then-record with 55 saves in a season and converted 84 consecutive save opportunities while closing for the Los Angeles Dodgers. Who am I?
Stat riddle: I hold the record for most points by a defenseman in a single NHL season with 139 in 1970-71, and I won 8 consecutive Norris Trophies. Who am I?
I played in 964 consecutive NHL games, an ironman record that stood for decades until Keith Yandle broke it. Who am I?
I hold the single-season record for most points by a rookie in the NHL with 132, and I won the Calder Trophy that year. Who am I?
This player scored 13 shorthanded goals in 1988-89, an all-time single-season record. Who is he?
I was an undrafted free agent who won the Hart Trophy and became one of the Tampa Bay Lightning's all-time great scorers. Who am I?
